name: R A Brown II E-Bus Mgmt
districts_or_customers: likely Kokomo / Howard County IN area schools
recent_news: No news found; very small operator (4 employees, ~$168K revenue) and no web presence. Kokomo School Corporation runs its own in-house transportation, suggesting R A Brown II may serve a small parochial/charter route or be a single-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-bus operator; unlikely a meaningful tuck-in unless aggregated with other Howard County, IN micro-operators. Low priority.

name: Rudroff Bus Co Inc
recent_news: Active contractor for Osage County R-II; partnered with county road crews on weather-related school operations (recent local Facebook post). DOT#838802, MC#370878 active. ~34 years in business per D&B.
fit_notes: Long-tenured family operator (Neuner) in rural central MO with embedded R-II district relationship. Too small to be a standalone tuck-in but viable bolt-on if Summit builds out-of-state Missouri density.

name: Golden Bus Svc Ctr Inc
districts_or_customers: likely NYC DOE / Queens-area private/yeshiva routes (Glendale, NY 11385)
recent_news: NY Dept of State filing #4705306 dated Feb 4, 2015; status active. No press, no website, no DOE contract appearance in major operator lists. Appears to be a very small Queens-based contractor, possibly serving private/religious schools given Glendale location.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (4 employees, ~$160K revenue) and not on NYC DOE prime contractor lists. Marginal interest; possible micro-tuck-in only if Summit pursues NYC private-school niche.

name: Back Mountain Transit Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Luzerne County PA / Back Mountain area (Dallas SD, Lake-Lehman SD likely service area)
recent_news: ~19 years in business per Buzzfile; located at 142 Outlet Rd, Dallas, PA 18612. Joe Foose listed as Owner on LinkedIn; no acquisition/M&A news found. Conflicting principal data between Foose (LinkedIn) and Yan (Buzzfile) — likely Foose is owner-operator and Yan may be a corporate officer or stale data.
fit_notes: Small family-owned PA operator in NEPA (Wilkes-Barre/Scranton metro) — possible add-on in Summit's PA expansion footprint. Sub-scale individually; only attractive as part of a broader Luzerne County roll-up.

name: Jumbo Westchester Taxi Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Westchester County NY school districts (likely SPED/1-on-1 routes from Thornwood/Mt Pleasant base)
recent_news: ~39 years in business per Buzzfile (founded ~1987). Estimated ~$998K revenue, ~10 employees at Thornwood location. Operates as combined taxi/livery and school transport — typical of small Westchester special-needs/individual-route contractor. No M&A news found.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (39 yrs) family operator with female owner-president — high succession-signal profile. Westchester is attractive Summit-adjacent market (NY metro SPED demand), but Jumbo's mixed taxi/school model and small scale make it a niche micro-tuck-in candidate rather than a core target.
